holdings.name: iShares ESG Select Screened S&P Mid-Cap ETF

raw.n: iShares ESG Select Screened S&P Mid-Cap ETF

holdings.n: iShares ESG Select Screened S&P Mid-Cap ETF

holdings.infoBox: MIDE is an equity ETF with a total of 281 individual holdings. The top holdings are Flex Ltd. stock at 2.20%, Twilio at 1.24%, TechnipFMC at 1.12%, Mcr Em S&P Sc 400 Jun26 at 1.10%, and Carpenter Technology at 1.10%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers S&P MidCap 400 Scored & Screened ETF (MIDE) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P MidCap 400 ESG index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US mid-cap companies with favorable ESG ratings. MIDE was launched on Feb 24, 2021 and is issued by Xtrackers.
